sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: A Script Include named (e.g.) LessonAvailabilityUtils is callable from Business Rules and Widget server scripts. Given a date/time, it returns the count of existing bookings and a boolean indicating whether the slot is available.
sys_app_requirement.description: Create a Script Include to calculate real-time lesson slot availability. The include queries the x_german_lesson table for existing records overlapping a given time slot, compares the count against the 3-teacher maximum, and returns availability status. It is consumed by both the calendar widget (client-callable) and server-side Business Rules.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-009: Availability Calculation Script Include
